name: od-nextjs-export
title: Export to Next.js
description: Starter downstream export plugin for turning an accepted Open Design artifact into a Next.js App Router handoff.

description_i18n.en: Starter downstream export plugin for turning an accepted Open Design artifact into a Next.js App Router handoff.
description_i18n.zh-CN: 入门级下游导出插件：把已 accept 的 Open Design 产物转成 Next.js App Router 交付。
description_i18n.zh-TW: 入門級下游匯出外掛：把已 accept 的 Open Design 產物轉成 Next.js App Router 交付。
description_i18n.ja: 受理済みの Open Design アーティファクトを Next.js App Router 用のハンドオフへ変換する、入門用ダウンストリームエクスポートプラグイン。
description_i18n.ko: 수락된 Open Design 산출물을 Next.js App Router 핸드오프로 변환하는 입문용 다운스트림 익스포트 플러그인.
description_i18n.de: Einsteiger-Downstream-Export: macht aus einem akzeptierten Open-Design-Artefakt eine Next.js-App-Router-Übergabe.
description_i18n.fr: Plugin d'export downstream de démarrage pour transformer un artefact Open Design accepté en handoff Next.js App Router.
description_i18n.ru: Стартовый downstream-экспорт-плагин: превращает принятый артефакт Open Design в передачу для Next.js App Router.
description_i18n.es: Plugin de exportación downstream inicial para convertir un artefacto aceptado de Open Design en un handoff de Next.js App Router.
description_i18n.pt-BR: Plugin de exportação downstream inicial para transformar um artefato aceito do Open Design em handoff do Next.js App Router.
description_i18n.it: Plugin di export downstream iniziale per trasformare un artefatto Open Design accettato in un handoff Next.js App Router.
description_i18n.vi: Plugin xuất downstream khởi đầu, chuyển artifact Open Design đã accept thành bàn giao Next.js App Router.
description_i18n.pl: Startowa wtyczka eksportu downstream: zamienia zaakceptowany artefakt Open Design w handoff Next.js App Router.
description_i18n.id: Plugin ekspor downstream pemula untuk mengubah artifact Open Design yang diterima menjadi handoff Next.js App Router.
description_i18n.nl: Starter-downstream-exportplug-in: zet een geaccepteerd Open Design-artefact om naar een Next.js App Router-overdracht.
description_i18n.ar: إضافة تصدير لاحق تمهيدية تحوّل عنصر Open Design المقبول إلى تسليم Next.js App Router.
description_i18n.tr: Kabul edilmiş bir Open Design çıktısını Next.js App Router devrine dönüştüren başlangıç downstream dışa aktarma eklentisi.
description_i18n.uk: Стартовий downstream-плагін експорту: перетворює прийнятий артефакт Open Design на передачу для Next.js App Router.

query.en: Export the accepted Open Design artifact to a Next.js App Router route or component. Preserve the visual system, split server/client boundaries intentionally, and finish with integration notes.
query.zh-CN: 将已确认的 Open Design 产物导出为 Next.js App Router 路由或组件。保持视觉系统一致，合理拆分 server/client 边界，并在最后给出集成说明。
